title: Course (LibV2 course.json)
description: Canonical shape for Trainforge-emitted course.json. Mirrors the on-disk artifact consumed by LibV2 retrieval (LibV2/tools/libv2/retrieval_scoring.py::load_course_outcomes) and the LibV2 scaffold validator (LibV2/tools/libv2/validator.py::validate_learning_outcomes). Wave 24 canonical source of truth — wired into Trainforge/process_course.py::_build_course_json for validation before write.

title.description: Human-readable course title from the IMSCC manifest.

learning_outcomes.description: Flat list of terminal + chapter LOs for this course. Emitted in the order produced by _build_course_json: terminal first, chapter second.

id.description: Canonical LO ID. Matches the Courseforge JSON-LD pattern. Trainforge emits lowercase; LibV2 matches case-insensitively.

hierarchy_level.description: Identifies whether this LO is a course-wide terminal outcome or a chapter-level outcome.

bloom_level.description: Bloom's taxonomy cognitive level. Canonical enum matches schemas/taxonomies/bloom_verbs.json top-level keys.

bloom_verb.description: Primary Bloom verb detected in the LO statement (optional; populated when hierarchy emit carries verb hints).

key_concepts.description: Optional slugified concept tags the LO covers. Populated by synthesize_objectives_from_topics.
